scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && ( [ -f .venv/bin/python ] && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload || [ -n "$VIRTUAL_ENV" ] && $VIRTUAL_ENV/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload || python3 -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload )
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && (cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt)
scripts.verify: npm run lint:frontend && npm run test:frontend && npm run build:frontend && npm run test:backend
